commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a persistence-success guard before clearing legacy credential/account stores and adds a migrator regression test for save failure plus retry cleanup.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: point `CodexBarConfigStore` at a `config.json` whose parent path is a regular file, seed a legacy token, and call `loadOrMigrate`; current main logs the save failure but still reaches legacy cleanup. I did not execute it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed for contributor proof and maintainer sign-off on credential migration behavior; there is no narrow code repair finding for ClawSweeper to fix.

target.title: Keep legacy credentials when config save fails
target.body:
Fixes #1140.

## Summary
- Stop legacy credential cleanup when migrated settings cannot be persisted.
- Keep the migration completion flag unset after a failed save so a later launch can retry.
- Add regression coverage for a blocked settings path and the retry path after persistence works again.

## Validation
- Parser hash check passed.
- SwiftFormat lint passed.
- SwiftLint strict passed with the local SourceKit framework path.
- Core target build passed.

## Local toolchain note
- Focused Swift tests and the app target build could not complete on this machine because only Command Line Tools are selected and the full SwiftUI macro plugins are unavailable; compilation stops before the migration tests run.
target.author: rajvardhanpatil07
